mapper.sql: t.topic_id, t.board_id, t.user_id, t.title, t.content, t.book_id, t.view_count, t.reply_count, t.last_reply_at, t.last_reply_user_id, t.pinned, t.locked, t.deleted, t.create_time, t.update_time, u.username AS author_name, b.title AS book_title, b.cover_image AS book_cover, lu.username AS last_reply_author_name
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM forum_topic t LEFT JOIN `user` u ON t.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN book b ON t.book_id = b.book_id AND b.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN `user` lu ON t.last_reply_user_id = lu.user_id WHERE t.topic_id = #{topicId} AND t.deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE forum_topic SET view_count = IFNULL(view_count, 0) + 1 WHERE topic_id = #{topicId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE forum_topic SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE topic_id = #{topicId}
